name: chutemundo
description: Plataforma deportiva de Chute Mundo con torneos ordenados, fixture, grupos, planteles y estadísticas sincronizadas con Firebase.

scripts.build: node -e "console.log('Chute Mundo es una app estática: no requiere build.')"
scripts.check:official: cat public/chute-official-part-*.txt > .chute-runtime-check.mjs && node --check .chute-runtime-check.mjs && node --check public/chute-detail-model.mjs && node --check public/chute-detail-ui.mjs && node --check public/chute-detail-events.mjs && node --check public/chute-detail-diagnostics.mjs && node --check public/chute-group-editor.mjs && node --check public/chute-premium-ui.mjs && node --check public/chute-tournament-hub.mjs
